author: Thomas 🐬🇺🇸
title: Looking to commission an artist
content: Looking to commission an artist. Please drop your work below. DO NOT DM, I will not be responding to those. #commissionwork #art

author: Yumi | Pre-debut vtuber
title: Looking for Live2D Artists
content: Looking for Live2D Artists! I'm currently looking to commission a Live2D model. If I love the art style, quality, and overall experience, I'll likely commission a full VTuber package in the future as well. Drop your portfolios below! #VTuber #VTuberArtist #Live2DArtist

author: AZE
title: LF digital artist
content: Looking for a digital artist and can edit simple videos. Requirements: can do manhwa/anime art style, create 3 or more videos per week, won't ghost us. PM me for more infos!
